eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cass, MN; at 11:28 AM on OCT 8, 2019 Effective until 11:58 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Office.  This is only a test. This is a test from the Cass County Sheriffs Office.  This is only a test.
